cards.back: A type of interface that uses visual elements, such as windows, icons, and menus, to interact with the operating system
A type of interface that uses text commands to interact with the operating system
A graphical element that provides access to various functions and options within the operating system
A graphical representation of the user's files, applications, and other data in the operating system
A small graphical representation of a file, application, or folder used in the operating system's interface
